title: hedypnois polymorpha var. cretica
intro: Hedypnois polymorpha var. cretica, also known as Cretan teasel, is a plant species in the family Compositae, characterized by its spiny leaves and stems. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hedypnois polymorpha var. cretica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. It is commonly prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried flowers and leaves, or used as a tincture in traditional medicine.
